member.name: T:UeiTccClientApi.Thermal
member.summary: Static class that contains static UEI TCC streaming methods

member.param: List of TD pins to stream
List of PowerSumMultiZone pins to stream (optional)

member.summary: Adjust Thermal Control Set Value. It wraps UeiClientAdjustControlSetValueAsync method from TOS.
